title: The Crew Pushes Back
description: On pages 16–19, the crew pushes back as usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart.
scene: The Crew Pushes Back. Usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You did it, Luffy! Now hurry up and destroy this candle set!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for jokes! Hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Luffy! This isn't the time for one of your idiotic antics!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Meh, just not in the mood to save you.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You're right!! Damn you, IGARAM!! I can't forgive you for committing such a tyrannical act in this refined manga, one piece!! With that makeup?! Hey!! I died him, okay?

summary: This part centers on the crew pushes back, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
